Careers

We’re always excited to connect with passionate and talented individuals looking to join our team. If you’re a licensed stylist who loves creating beautiful hair, or an organized and friendly receptionist who enjoys providing exceptional client experiences, we’d love to hear from you.

At our salon, we value creativity, professionalism, and a positive team environment.

Send your resume and a brief introduction to hairbydesign474@hotmail.com to learn more about current opportunities.
